Actual kiln/workshop venues where visitors can watch pottery being made (not just museums). No visitor experience info (tours, hands-on workshops, opening hours for kilns).
wrong_data: Hakata Ori (weaving) is included as a Saga craft result but is primarily a Fukuoka craft and irrelevant to the pottery query.
improvement_hint: Apply region fan-out to all Kyushu prefectures (40-47) when the query toponym is 'Kyushu'. Also filter by industry_category='陶磁器' when the query is specifically about pottery, and supplement with kiln/workshop venue data rather than general museums.

reasoning: The user asked for festivals across the entire Tohoku region (도호쿠 지방 = 6 prefectures: Aomori, Iwate, Miyagi, Akita, Yamagata, Fukushima), but the tool was called only for Aomori prefecture. This is a major coverage failure — only 2 Aomori-specific festivals are returned in the items array. The national_heritage section is padded with many non-Tohoku UNESCO festivals (Saitama, Toyama, Gifu, Aichi, Mie, Chiba, Oita, Tochigi) which are irrelevant to the query. The Korean language requirement (lang=ko) was respected, so RULE D does not apply. Per RULE A, the data returned is real and authoritative but severely under-scoped. Per RULE C, this is a coverage failure (G), not a retrieval failure per se — the tool was called with a single prefecture instead of region fanout. Famous Tohoku festivals like Sendai Tanabata, Akita Kanto, Yamagata Hanagasa, and Morioka Sansa are entirely absent.
missing_data: Festivals from Iwate, Miyagi, Akita, Yamagata, Fukushima prefectures are entirely missing. Key festivals absent: Sendai Tanabata (仙台七夕), Akita Kanto (秋田竿燈), Yamagata Hanagasa (山形花笠), Morioka Sansa Odori, Aomori Nebuta's sister festivals. The national_heritage section is dominated by non-Tohoku entries that add noise rather than value.
wrong_data: The national_heritage section includes many festivals from outside Tohoku (Saitama, Toyama, Gifu, Aichi, Mie, Chiba, Oita, Tochigi) that are irrelevant to the Tohoku query. Dainichido Bugaku (Akita) is relevant but the rest are not. This creates misleading scope.
improvement_hint: The tool should support a region parameter (e.g. region=tohoku) that triggers fan-out across all 6 Tohoku prefectures. Alternatively, the agent should call get_festivals 6 times (one per prefecture) and merge results. The national_heritage section should be filtered to only include entries geographically within the queried scope.
